name: Remote Proxy Server Scanner
notes: Reports a remote host attempting reconnaissance or suspicious connections on common proxy server ports to more than 30 hosts in 10 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times
conditions_text: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 29 destination IP within 10 minutes
when the context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Proxy Ports
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 29 destination IP within 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Remote Proxy Server Scanner on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 29 destination IP within 10 minutes
AND when the context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
AND when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Proxy Ports
RED_list: Event name: Remote Proxy Server Scanner Detected
Event description: Detected  a remote host attempting reconnaissance or suspicious connections on common proxy server ports to more than 30 hosts in 10 minutes.
